task: put the ring on the olive spoke
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A robotic arm is positioned above a wooden surface with a brown baseboard. On the surface, there are four vertical rods: a green one, a blue one, an orange one, and a yellow one. The yellow rod has a ring (orange) at its top. The task is to place the ring onto the olive (green) rod. The green rod is the target destination. The ring is currently on the yellow rod. The robotic arm must grasp the ring, transport it, and place it onto the green rod. The green rod is a vertical structure, so the ring must be placed at the top of the green rod. The yellow rod is also vertical, so the ring can be grasped from its top. The green rod is the only other vertical rod, so it is the correct destination. The task requires precise placement to ensure the ring sits on the green rod. **STRATEGY -** First, the robotic arm must reach the yellow rod to grasp the ring. Then, it must transport the ring to the green rod and place it at the top. The sequence is: reach yellow rod, grasp ring, transport to green rod, place on green rod. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach the yellow rod to access the ring. The affordance is the body of the yellow rod. Step 2: Grasp the ring from the top of the yellow rod. The affordance is the top of the yellow rod where the ring is located. Step 3: Transport the ring to the green rod. The affordance is the body of the green rod. Step 4: Place the ring on the top of the green rod. The affordance is the top of the green rod.

Goal: on(ring, green_rod); stable(ring)
Scene: robotic_arm, yellow_rod, green_rod, blue_rod, orange_rod, ring
Step 1: reach(yellow_rod)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow_rod
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_rod, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_rod) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(ring)
  affordance_region: the top of the yellow_rod where the ring is located
  contact: holding(ring) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(ring)
Step 3: transport(ring -> green_rod)
  affordance_region: the body of the green_rod
  spatial: above(ring, green_rod, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(ring)
  done_when: above(ring, green_rod, 0.05)
Step 4: place(ring -> green_rod)
  affordance_region: the top of the green_rod
  contact: surface_contact(ring, green_rod) [completion]; released(ring) [completion]
  pose: stable(ring) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(ring, green_rod) AND released(ring)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top of the yellow_rod where the ring is located
